settings.title: Special Workspaces
settings.description: Configure special workspaces shown in the bar widget.

showPill.label: Show Pill
showPill.description: Show a colored circle behind the drawer icon.

focusColor.label: Focus Color
focusColor.description: Color of the drawer button when active.

expandDirection.label: Expand Direction
expandDirection.description: Which direction the workspace pills expand from the drawer.

enabled.label: Panel Background
enabled.description: Show a background behind the floating panel.

panelBackgroundColor.label: Panel Background Color
panelBackgroundColor.description: Background color of the floating panel.

hideEmpty.label: Hide Empty Workspaces
hideEmpty.description: Hide workspaces in drawer when not focused/active.

showPill.label: Show Pill
showPill.description: Show a colored circle behind this workspace icon.

focusColor.label: Focus Color
focusColor.description: Color of this workspace button when focused.
